title: General Instructions for Using the IntelliCage with Mice
author: Kahnau
materials: IntelliCage with all ports and cables supplied

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: All data recorded during the experiment—number of visits (correct and incorrect), visit time, number of nosepokes (correct and incorrect), number of licks—are stored on the PC/laptop under Documents ‐> New Behavior ‐> IntelliCage Plus ‐> Archive.

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: The data can be displayed in the Analyzer and thus provide a first overview.

steps.title: Statistical Analysis
steps.instruction: The analysis of the results depends on the research question and can be done, for example, with the statistics program R. Examples of the evaluation of a consumer demand experiment in the IntelliCage with R can be found here: https://zenodo.org/records/6325238
